creator: ronald@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi. This compiles fine on aarch64.

Only thing I encountered is that graphics/mesa-devel has a plist error if you run poudriere with stage-qa. I assume this also happens for other ARCHS than aarch64.
The port lang/clover (which this PR is actually about) builds without any errors in stage-qa on aarch64.

Shall I commit your patch or are you able to do that yourself as you have a @freebsd.org email?
